title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.235 - Chaplain, appointment or arrangement for religious services
text:
217.235.  Chaplain, appointment or arrangement for religious services. — The director shall appoint chaplains or arrange for religious services from the community for the correctional centers.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 59, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
